content:
# Best AI Audio Tools for Podcast Editors in 2026

Podcast editing is time-consuming, but AI audio tools are changing the game. Edit faster, improve quality, and create professional podcasts with less effort!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]: Edit Audio Like Text

[[link:/tools/79|Descript]] is a game-changer for podcast editors because it lets you edit audio by editing text.

It also offers AI voice cloning, transcription, and multi-track editing.

### Why Descript for Podcasts?
- **Text-based editing**: Delete filler words by deleting the text
- **AI transcription**: Accurate, fast transcripts
- **Multi-track editing**: Perfect for interviews

---

## [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]: Realistic AI Voiceovers

[[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] creates incredibly realistic AI voices that are perfect for podcast intros, ads, or even full episodes.

If you need voiceovers but don't want to record, this is the tool for you.

### ElevenLabs for Podcasts
- **Human-like voices**: Listeners won't know it's AI
- **Emotion control**: Adjust the tone of voice
- **Voice cloning**: Clone your own voice or create a unique one

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Free Plan |
|------|----------|-------|-----------|
| [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] | Text-based editing | $12/mo | Yes (3 hrs) |
| [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] | AI voiceovers | $5/mo | Yes (limited) |
| [[link:/tools/200|Suno]] | AI music | $8/mo | Yes |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Editing existing podcasts**: Use [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]
- **Adding voiceovers**: Try [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]
- **Creating intro music**: Check out [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]

Ready to revolutionize your podcast workflow? Give these tools a try!

For more insights, check out our guide: [[link:/blog/best-ai-audio-tools-2026|Best AI Audio Tools 2026]]
